zh.lifeSummary: 當Rénier Ier de Montferrat於1084年出生在義大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞蒙福拉托時，他的父親WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO52歲，母親Otta d'Aglie34歲。他和Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1135年5月在法國瓦爾蒙特福拉特享年51歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特辛雷福洛阿巴其亞 桑塔 瑪麗亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rénier Ier de Montferrat于1084年出生在意大利皮蒙特阿利善德利亞蒙福拉托时，他的父亲WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO52岁，母亲Otta d'Aglie34岁。他和Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1135年5月在法国瓦爾蒙特福拉特享年51岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特辛雷福洛阿巴其亞 桑塔 瑪麗亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rénier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Rénier Ier de Montferrat was born in 1084, in Monferrato, Alessandria, Piedmont, Italy, his father, WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO, was 52 and his mother, Otta d'Aglie, was 34. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté. He died in May 1135, in Montferrat, Var, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Pie: Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rénier Ier de Montferrat est né en 1084, à Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italie, son père, WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Otta d'Aglie, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté. Il est décédé en mai 1135, à Montferrat, Var, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie.

de.Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Pie: Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Rénier Ier de Montferrat 1084 in Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO 52 und seine Mutter Otta d'Aglie 34. Er hatte mit Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1135 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Montferrat, Var, Frankreich und wurde in Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rénier Ier de Montferrat è nato il nel 1084 nel Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Italia, il suo padre, WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Otta d'Aglie, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté. Morì nel maggio 1135, nel Montferrat, Var, Francia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Rénier Ier de Montferratが1084年にイタリアピエモントアレッサンドリアモンフエラトーで生まれた時，父WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATOは52歳，母Otta d'Aglieは34歳であった。彼はGisèle de Bourgogne-Comtéとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1135年5月にフランスバーモントフエラットで51歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントクウネオレベロアッバズア サンタ マリアにて埋葬された。

ko.Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Pie: 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 러에벨로 애브바지아 산타 마이아
ko.lifeSummary: Rénier Ier de Montferrat(이)가 1084년 이탈리아 피몽 알레산드리아 몬페라토에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Otta d'Aglie(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1135년 5월 프랑스 바르 몽페라트에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 러에벨로 애브바지아 산타 마이아에 묻혔다.

pt.Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Pie: Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rénier Ier de Montferrat nasceu em 1084, em Monferrato, Alessandria, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Otta d'Aglie, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté. Ele faleceu em maio de 1135, em Montferrat, Var, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália.

ro.Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Pie: Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia

ru.Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Pie: эббазя санта маря, ривеллоу, кунео, пиемонт, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rénier Ier de Montferrat родился в 1084 г. в местности монфиррато, алессэндря, пиемонт, Италия, его отцу по имени WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Otta d'Aglie, 34. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Gisèle de Bourgogne-Comté. Он умер май 1135 г. в местности монтфиррат, вар, Франция в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности эббазя санта маря, ривеллоу, кунео, пиемонт, Италия.

Murió en mayo de 1135, en Montferrat, Var, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Abbazia Santa Maria, Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.
